title: PhD
biography: Gunter Blobel was a German-American biologist who discovered that proteins have intrinsic signals governing their transport and localization in the cell. Nobel Prize 1999.
aiSummary: Gunter Blobel is a cell biology specialist at Rockefeller University. Based in New York.
